list.title: Project Context
list.subtitle: Every markdown file discovered under this repo's specs/, docs/, and insights/ folders — browse and preview what's available to attach to an agent or skill.
list.notClonedBody: Clone this repository before Project Context can discover its documents.
list.noDocsBody: This repo has no markdown under specs/, docs/, or insights/ yet. Add some and they'll show up here.

empty.title: No spec files yet
empty.body: Drop your PRDs, tech specs, and acceptance criteria under .devdigest/specs/. Every agent and the PR brief read them as grounding context.

notFound.title: Document not found
notFound.body: This document no longer exists at this path. It may have been renamed, moved, or deleted since it was last discovered.
